positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a cosmic forest scene. The foreground features large, abstract bioluminescent flora and fauna (glowing mushrooms, floating crystalline leaves, gently spiraling cosmic roots). The background depicts a nebula-filled sky viewed through gaps in ancient, stylized celestial rock formations. Use deep indigo, vibrant cyan, electric magenta, and soft gold for the color palette. The style should be 'Psychedelic Neo-Art Nouveau' with sharp, clean outlines and strong color saturation, designed for a high-contrast repeat pattern print. Central composition, detailed silhouettes against glowing backlighting. Vector art aesthetic, perfect for T-shirts, centered, symmetrical balance.
